name: Pear-Walnut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can sliced pears, drained and chopped (8 ozs.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine bread mix, nectar, and egg in a large bowl until well blended.
3. Stir in chopped pears and nuts.
4. Turn batter into greased and floured 8 1/2 x 4 1/2-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake for 45 to 55 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool bread 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack.
7. Remove from pan and cool completely on rack.
Yield: 1 loaf
Preparation Time: 5 minutes
Baking Time: 45 to 55 minutes
